posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are so many awesome ways to use monday․com ‍as your CRM! It’s truly one of our favorite use cases at Polished Geek during client implementation projects.

The downside of that flexibility is it can be confusing and time-consuming to decide which CRM approach is best for your situation.

That’s why Polished Geek created the Ultimate monday․com ‍CRM Review and Comparison Guide. In it we explore six different options for your monday CRM, with the pros and cons (and pricing!) for each:

  1. Monday․com’s free CRM template
  2. Monday․com’s Sales CRM product
  3. eCRM monday․com app by Eligeo
  4. CarbonCRM Suite by CarbonWeb
  5. External CRM system integration with monday․com, such as Pipedrive and Salesforce
  6. Craft the perfect custom monday․com ‍CRM for your business

Take a look:

The Ultimate monday.com CRM Review: A Comparison Guide

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek
